items.title: Arcos Dorados to Participate in Upcoming Investor Event
items.description: MONTEVIDEO, Uruguay, October 06, 2025--Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) ("Arcos Dorados" or the "Company"), Latin America’s largest restaurant chain and the world’s largest independent McDonald’s franchisee, today announced its participation in the following investor event:

items.title: The Dow Is Missing Out on the AMD Rally
items.description: The blue-chip index, which weighs its members by stock price rather than market cap, fell sharply on a day when the Nasdaq and the S&P 500 were on track for record closing highs.  The Dow was down 266 points, or 0.6%.  Only 10 stocks in the index were rising, and some of its heaviest hitters—Sherwin-Williams, Home Depot, McDonald’s, and Salesforce—were big laggards.
